creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 195189
py-pypa-docs-theme.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch for the Python package textproc/py-pypa-docs-theme, which provides a common base Sphinx theme for PyPA projects.

It will be needed for devel/py-pip to build the supplied documentation for it.


QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.2-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK


Note: Before this port can be committed, the textproc/py-python-docs-theme port must be committed first. (see also PR #229820: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=229820)
